services.subtitle: Athletic Excellence
services.title: What I offer

items.title: Personalized Coaching
items.description: 100% tailored plan adapted to your goals, body, and lifestyle with a full initial assessment.

items.title: Weekly Planning
items.description: Detailed routines week by week with zero improvisation. Professional training structure.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Constant monitoring and direct access to your coach to ensure you never lose track or motivation.

items.title: Form Correction
items.description: In-depth analysis of your exercises to maximize results and ensure safe training.

services.cta_description: A personalized plan and professional guidance are what make the difference between trying and achieving. Let's talk today.

problems.subtitle: SOUNDS FAMILIAR?
problems.title_1: IF YOU ARE GOING THROUGH THIS,

items.title: No Physical Progress
items.description: Your body doesn't change even though you train consistently.

items.title: Loss of Strength
items.description: You feel like you're moving backward instead of advancing in your marks.

items.title: Lack of Motivation
items.description: You don't know what to do and you're about to give up.

items.title: No Clear Direction
items.description: You train without a real plan and the results don't come.

items.title: Little Time
items.description: Your schedule doesn't allow you to follow generic internet routines.

items.question: How do payments work?
items.answer: Payments are monthly. This allows us to maintain a week-by-week follow-up with total flexibility: you renew month by month based on your results and satisfaction.

items.question: Do I need previous gym experience?
items.answer: Not at all. I work with people of all levels, from beginners to advanced athletes. I adapt each plan to your experience, current physical condition, and specific goals.

items.question: How does communication work?
items.answer: We communicate mainly via WhatsApp, where you can send me questions, exercise videos, progress photos, and any concerns. I respond daily and I'm available for video calls when necessary.

items.question: What payment methods do I accept?
items.answer: I accept bank transfers, mobile payment apps, and other digital methods.

footer.description: Your best physical version starts with a smart plan.
